belier.intro: The Moon deepens through Gemini, now at 22 degrees, still lighting your third house of communication as the waning crescent thins to a mere 5.6 percent illumination, the sky nearly dark ahead of tomorrow's New Moon. This is the final stretch of release; whatever conversation or small task you have been avoiding wants closure today, not tomorrow. The Cancer Sun continues warming your fourth house, drawing attention gently toward home.
belier.love: A brief, honest exchange clears lingering tension better than a long, heavy conversation today. Say the simple thing and let it be enough; the near-dark Moon favors economy of words.
belier.work: Finish what is left of your correspondence and small tasks today; the coming New Moon prefers a clean slate. Do not start anything major, but do close every loose thread you can find.
belier.energy: Energy runs thin and quick under this nearly dark Moon, suited to small closing actions rather than sustained effort. Rest early tonight to meet tomorrow's New Moon with a clear head.
belier.intuition: A last piece of information arrives today that completes a picture you have been puzzling over. Trust that the timing is not coincidental; the dark Moon often delivers exactly what is needed just before it turns.
belier.mantra: I close what is finished so I can begin anew.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini continues through your second house of resources, its light thinning to just 5.6 percent as the sky approaches tomorrow's New Moon darkness. This is the last day to tie off any loose financial thread before a fresh cycle begins. The Cancer Sun in your third house keeps communication gentle and unhurried, well suited to a final honest conversation about money or value.
taureau.love: A small, overdue acknowledgment of a partner's contribution, financial or otherwise, matters more today than it might on an ordinary day. Say it plainly before the New Moon turns the page.
taureau.work: Settle an outstanding invoice, close a small financial loop, or simply record where things stand before tomorrow. The near-dark Moon favors tidying over any new financial commitment.
taureau.energy: Your steady energy runs quieter than usual under this nearly invisible Moon. Let today be about completion rather than building, the last calm breath before new growth begins.
taureau.intuition: A quiet, settled feeling about your finances arrives today, different from the searching quality of recent days. Trust that this calm is earned, not naive.
taureau.mantra: I close this chapter of my finances with peace, not worry.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon reaches 22 degrees in your own sign today, still in your first house, its light thinned to just 5.6 percent as the sky approaches near-total darkness before tomorrow's New Moon. This balsamic phase in your own sign is a rare, potent moment of near-invisibility followed swiftly by renewal, uniquely yours this cycle. Let today be about quiet completion of who you have been, in preparation for who you are becoming.
gemeaux.love: Say less today and simply be present; the almost-dark Moon in your own sign favors closure over new declarations. A relationship benefits from the honesty of your quiet, undramatic self.
gemeaux.work: Finish, rather than start. Whatever small task or ongoing project has trailed on too long deserves a deliberate ending today, freeing you fully for tomorrow's fresh beginning.
gemeaux.energy: Energy is at its lowest ebb of the cycle today, and that is exactly right. Rest deeply tonight; the New Moon tomorrow falls in your own house of self and asks for a clear vessel to fill.
gemeaux.intuition: A subtle but unmistakable sense of ending arrives today, the closing of a particular chapter of self-understanding. Trust it fully; tomorrow begins something genuinely new for you.
gemeaux.mantra: I let this self rest so a new one can rise.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini remains in your twelfth house of retreat, its light nearly gone at 5.6 percent illumination as your own Sun advances to 19 degrees and Mercury continues retrograde through your sign. Tomorrow's New Moon will land directly in Cancer itself, a rare and significant moment of renewal for you specifically, and today is its final, quiet approach. Let yourself disappear a little; you are gathering strength for something real.
cancer.love: Whatever has felt emotionally unresolved benefits from one more day of quiet rather than a rushed resolution. A partner who gives you this space without demanding explanation is offering exactly what you need.
cancer.work: Step back from anything requiring visibility or decisive action today if you can. Mercury retrograde in your sign combined with this near-dark Moon favors invisibility over initiative, just one more day.
cancer.energy: This is close to the quietest point of your entire emotional cycle. Let sleep, solitude, and stillness take precedence over any obligation that can reasonably wait until tomorrow.
cancer.intuition: A deep, wordless knowing about what you need to release is settling into place today, ahead of tomorrow's significant New Moon in your own sign. Trust it completely; you are closer to clarity than you realize.
cancer.mantra: I rest fully so tomorrow can begin fully.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini continues through your eleventh house of community, its light thinning to just 5.6 percent as the Cancer Sun deepens its passage through your twelfth house of solitude. This near-dark sky favors quietly assessing your social world one last time before tomorrow's New Moon offers a fresh start. Withdraw a little from group obligations today without guilt.
lion.love: A friend or social connection linked to your relationship may need one final, brief acknowledgment today. Keep it simple; tomorrow's New Moon prefers you arrive with a lighter load.
lion.work: Close out any pending group correspondence or collaborative loose ends today. The near-dark Moon rewards finishing quietly rather than starting something new within your networks.
lion.energy: Your usual radiance dims appropriately today, asking for rest rather than performance. This is not a diminishment of your fire but its necessary banking before it rises again.
lion.intuition: A quiet clarity about which social ties genuinely serve you settles in today. Trust the calm certainty over any lingering doubt; you have done the necessary sorting already.
lion.mantra: I release what no longer serves my circle.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini remains in your tenth house of career, its light nearly extinguished at 5.6 percent as Mercury, your ruler, continues retrograde in Cancer within this same professional sector. Today asks for one final act of quiet closure regarding a work matter before tomorrow's New Moon offers a genuinely fresh start. Avoid launching anything new; finish instead.
vierge.love: A partner's patience with your work preoccupation deserves acknowledgment today. A small, sincere thank you costs little and means much under this closing lunar light.
vierge.work: Complete the review Mercury retrograde has been asking of you rather than extending it further. Submit, send, or file what has been sitting unfinished; tomorrow prefers a clean professional slate.
vierge.energy: Mental energy is quieter and more inward today, well suited to final checks rather than new initiatives. Trust the slower pace; precision matters more than speed right now.
vierge.intuition: A final clarifying insight about your career direction arrives today, the last piece Mercury retrograde had to offer. Write it down; you will want it when the New Moon invites new plans tomorrow.
vierge.mantra: I finish with precision so I can begin with clarity.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini continues through your ninth house of belief, its light thinning to just 5.6 percent as the Cancer Sun deepens its hold on your tenth house of career. This near-dark sky favors a final, quiet reconsideration of a long-term plan or philosophy before tomorrow's New Moon offers fresh direction. Let today be reflective rather than declarative.
balance.love: A shared belief about the future, previously discussed lightly, deserves one more honest check-in today. Keep the tone gentle; certainty is not required yet, only honesty.
balance.work: A plan connected to growth or further learning benefits from a final quiet review today rather than a bold announcement. Let the idea settle fully before tomorrow's New Moon asks you to commit.
balance.energy: Your usual social ease turns inward and contemplative today. A quiet walk or solitary reflection serves you better than another conversation right now.
balance.intuition: A settled, calm certainty about what you truly believe emerges today, replacing the searching quality of recent days. Trust this quiet resolution.
balance.mantra: I let my beliefs settle into quiet certainty.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini remains in your eighth house of shared resources, its light nearly gone at 5.6 percent as the Cancer Sun continues warming your ninth house of meaning. Today is the final quiet turn of a financial or emotional reckoning before tomorrow's New Moon offers real renewal. Close what needs closing rather than opening anything new.
scorpion.love: An honest, brief word about emotional or financial entanglement settles something today that has lingered unresolved. Let simplicity replace intensity just this once.
scorpion.work: Settle a shared financial matter definitively today if you can; a contract signed, an account reconciled, a fee finally agreed upon. Tomorrow's New Moon prefers a clean foundation to build from.
scorpion.energy: Your usual intensity quiets into something more contemplative today, the necessary rest before renewal. Let stillness do its work rather than pushing for one more transformation today.
scorpion.intuition: A final, clear insight about a shared resource or deep bond arrives today, completing what has been forming all week. Trust it and let it rest; tomorrow will build on this clarity.
scorpion.mantra: I let this reckoning end in peace, not conflict.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini continues to activate your seventh house of partnership, its light thinning to just 5.6 percent as the Cancer Sun deepens its passage through your eighth house of intimacy. Today asks for one final honest conversation with a partner before tomorrow's New Moon offers a genuinely fresh chapter in the relationship. Keep the exchange simple and complete.
sagittaire.love: Say the last honest thing that needs saying today, gently and without excess. A partner is more receptive to closure than confrontation under this near-dark sky.
sagittaire.work: A negotiation or collaboration benefits from a final round of plain communication today rather than being left open-ended. Settle what can be settled before tomorrow's fresh start.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual expansive energy turns quieter and more relational today, content to simply be near someone rather than seeking new adventure. Honor that shift.
sagittaire.intuition: A clear, settled sense of where a partnership truly stands arrives today. Trust this calm clarity over any earlier uncertainty; it is the result of real reflection, not avoidance.
sagittaire.mantra: I let honesty close this chapter gently.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini remains in your sixth house of routine, its light nearly extinguished at 5.6 percent as the Cancer Sun continues its passage through your seventh house of partnership. Today favors closing out small daily obligations and health-related loose ends before tomorrow's New Moon invites a fresh routine. Keep today practical and unremarkable by design.
capricorne.love: A partner's help with a small daily task deserves genuine thanks today. Let simple gratitude replace any need for a bigger conversation right now.
capricorne.work: Finish the small administrative or routine tasks that have been trailing behind you. A clean daily slate tomorrow serves you far better than carrying loose ends into the New Moon.
capricorne.energy: Your usual discipline can rest today; this near-dark Moon asks for maintenance, not achievement. Complete only what genuinely needs completing.
capricorne.intuition: A quiet realization about which daily habit no longer serves you settles clearly today. Trust the simplicity of this insight; it does not need to be complicated to be true.
capricorne.mantra: I let small completions prepare me for new beginnings.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini continues through your fifth house of creativity, its light thinning to just 5.6 percent as Pluto retrograde persists in your own sign and Neptune retrograde lingers in Aries within your ninth house of belief. Today favors gently closing a creative or romantic thread before tomorrow's New Moon offers fresh inspiration. Let today be reflective rather than productive.
verseau.love: A light, honest closing word about where a romantic connection stands serves you better today than either avoidance or a dramatic conversation. Simplicity is the theme.
verseau.work: Wrap up a small creative task rather than beginning anything ambitious today. The near-dark Moon favors quiet completion, freeing you for whatever the New Moon inspires tomorrow.
verseau.energy: Your usual inventive restlessness quiets today, content with small, low-stakes completions. Let this be enough without pushing for a breakthrough.
verseau.intuition: A settled insight about your own inner restructuring, courtesy of Pluto's ongoing retrograde, arrives with unusual calm today. Trust the quiet rather than searching for more drama in it.
verseau.mantra: I let quiet insight replace the need for drama.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon at 22 degrees Gemini remains in your fourth house of home, its light nearly gone at 5.6 percent as the sky approaches tomorrow's significant New Moon. Today favors quiet domestic closure, a conversation finished, a space tidied, before the fresh emotional chapter that begins tomorrow. Neptune's retrograde resonance continues to color your inner world gently in the background.
poissons.love: A small, unfinished domestic conversation with a partner deserves closure today rather than being carried forward. Keep it brief and kind.
poissons.work: If working from home, use today to tidy loose ends in your physical space and pending tasks rather than starting anything new. A clear environment welcomes tomorrow's fresh energy.
poissons.energy: Your emotional depth turns toward rest and simplicity today, the last quiet breath before the New Moon stirs something new. Let stillness be sufficient.
poissons.intuition: A gentle, settled feeling about your home life arrives today, different from the searching quality of recent days. Trust this calm; it has been earned through real reflection.
poissons.mantra: I let my home rest quietly before it welcomes something new.
poissons.author: Sibylle
